exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Primary compound for Push B. 12kg — if 4x10 lands clean today, step to 14kg next week. Press fully overhead, control the descent.

exercises.name: Incline DB Press
exercises.notes: Build 3 clean sets at 14kg before progressing. Upper chest focus — slight incline, elbows at ~75° to body.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.notes: Hold at 6kg — isolation focus today. Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height. Check form in mirror.

exercises.name: Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.notes: Working weight is 24kg. Full stretch at bottom — that long-head stretch is the whole point. Control it.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown
exercises.notes: Elbows locked at sides, full extension at bottom. Hit 3x12 clean and step to 38kg next week.
